items.stimpak: A quick jab of the needle, and the cold fluid floods your veins, a jolt of adrenaline that brings the pain back to bearable levels, if not to the point of feeling whole again.
items.ram-chip: The tiny chip slots into the jack at the base of your skull, a surge of data flowing directly into your brain, expanding your mental capacity just long enough to hack another layer of ICE.
items.ice-breaker: The intrusion blade slides into your hand like a well-worn glove, its edge humming with potential as you feel the power flow through the handle, ready to carve a path through the most fortified systems.
items.mono-katana: The monomolecular blade sings as it slides from its sheath, a razor-thin line of light that cuts through the air and any other material with equal ease, the perfect extension of your will.
items.cyberdeck: The deck slots into place, and suddenly the world comes alive with data streams, your perception expanded to see the hidden networks that crisscross the city, ready to be exploited.
items.trauma-kit: The kit snaps open, revealing a myriad of tools and drugs, each one designed to stabilize a wounded body just long enough to make it to the next safe house or medbay.
items.mega-stim: The syringe feels like a lead weight in your hand, the drug inside it potent enough to raise the dead, a last-ditch effort to keep you in the fight when everything else has failed.
items.ram-bank: The bank clicks into place, a sudden burst of data pouring into your consciousness, a temporary boost to your mental capabilities that feels like unlocking a new level of thought.
items.war-axe: The axe feels like an extension of your arm, the weight perfectly balanced, the power cell in the hilt humming with a desire to smash through anything in its path.
items.rail-blade: The blade snaps into your hand, the rail system charging with a low whine, the weapon ready to carve through any defense, whether it's made of meat or metal.
items.monowire: A whisper-thin wire that hums with deadly potential, slicing through flesh and steel with a touch.
items.quantum-deck: A deck that harnesses quantum entanglement, granting a runner's mind vast new horizons of data.
items.neural-deck: A neural lace that weaves itself into your mind, boosting your RAM like a second brain.
items.subdermal-plating: A mesh of nanites that weave into your skin, providing a second layer of protection that feels like an extra layer of you.
items.reflex-booster: A chip that rewires your nerves, turning your reflexes into lightning-fast responses that feel like pre-cognition.
items.neural-coprocessor: A coprocessor that links to your brain, providing instant access to data and enhancing your intelligence with a strange, alien lucidity.
items.titanium-weave: A weave of titanium threads that reinforce your muscles, making every movement feel like a superhuman effort.
items.kerenzikov: Nerve wiring that allows you to perform multiple actions simultaneously, a dizzying blur that feels like being in two places at once.
items.cortex-bridge: A bridge that connects your brain to external data sources, providing instant knowledge that feels like it's always been there.
items.myomer-bundle: Bundles of myomer fibers that replace and enhance your muscles, granting strength that feels like you could move mountains.
items.synaptic-amp: Feels like a constant jolt of synth-caf, your reflexes on overdrive as your nervous system rides the edge of a razor
items.mnemonic-array: Like having a perfect digital copy of your brain, recalling facts and figures with crystal clarity
items.juggernaut-frame: A second skeleton of durasteel, reinforcing your bones, turning your body into a tank
items.sandevistan: Time slows to a crawl, every fraction of a second stretched out, giving you a dancer's grace in combat
items.quantum-cortex: Your mind becomes a quantum computer, processing information at speeds beyond human comprehension
items.berserker-core: A red haze descends, your body fueled by rage, muscles swelling with primal strength
items.goliath-chassis: Your frame expands, muscles and bones growing, becoming a literal giant among men
items.hyper-reflex: Every motion becomes lightning-fast, a blur to the untrained eye, like a speed freak's wildest dreams
items.ascendant-mind: Your thoughts race, connections forming and dissolving in an instant, every neuron firing in unison

nz1: Choom, you're new to the Underbelly, eh? Watch your step 'cause the wrong move could land you in the Neon Wasteland — or worse, on the wrong side of the Arcology's security teams.
Fixer-7's a solid contact if you need scrip quick, but don't let him catch you jacked-in without your Tracewright scrubber — or you'll be the one traced.
Heard tell of a runner who jacked too deep, straight into the Core. Never saw him again, but the screams still echo in the Net.
The gangs here are ruthless, choom. Don't go wandering down the wrong alley unless you're packing heat.
The Neon Wasteland's not just a story, runner. It's a place — a dark, forgotten underlayer where they say the worst of the worst are left to rot.
nz10: The Living Library's a chrome cowboy's wet dream - all of human knowledge just begging to be jacked. But they say the data's got a mind of its own down there.
Heard they've got a new AI running the place. Name's Vex, and she's not fond of runners poking around her archives.
Watch your six in the stacks. Rumor has it there's a ghost in the machine, an old AI gone rogue, haunting the corridors.
You see that cat with the cyberarm? They say he's got a direct line to the Library's core. Call him 'Scribe', he's the one you wanna talk to if you need info.
Beware the whispers in the stacks. They say the Library's got a way of twisting your thoughts, getting inside your head. Keep your wits about you, choom.
nz2: Rumor has it, Mr. Lattice's proxy war is gonna make the Net run red with blood, choom. Choose your patron wisely.
Watch your back, runner. The Arbiter's got eyes everywhere, and they ain't friendly.
They say the Arbiter's been tinkering with the Geo-Anchor Vault. Could be trouble brewing for those who descend.
In the Neon Wasteland, the law of the street is the law of the runner. Stay sharp or end up as meat for the gangers.
The Blip's gone quiet, like the calm before a storm. Something's coming, and it ain't good.
nz3: Ravel's got the run on the deep Net, but word is he's soft on runners with the right creds. Might be worth greasing his palm.
The Blur's a maze, but you're a shadow. Just keep your chrome shiny and your back clean.
Heard tell of a new faction brewing in the Neon Wasteland, calling themselves the Neo-Wolves. Might be worth keeping an eye on.
The Geo-Anchor Vault's a graveyard, but some say it's where the real power lies. If you're brave enough to make the run, that is.
Watch your step in the Net, choom. ICE is getting smarter, and the corps are closing in. Better have a quicksilver exit strategy.
nz4: You'd best keep your eyes peeled 'round here, choom. They say the Corporate Warlords are squaring off, and when they do, this whole district could go up in smoke.
Word is, the Rogue Overseer's been snooping around, asking 'bout the Geo-Anchor Vault. Nobody knows why, but it ain't gonna be pretty if they find out what's really down there.

There's a runner goes by the name of Chrome Circuit Cowboy, been spreading tales about a 'Neon Wasteland' beneath the city. They say it's where the real power lies, but ain't nobody ever come back from down there.

Watch your back in these crosshairs. There's more than just Corporate muscle lurking in the shadows. The street gangs, they've got their eyes on something big, and they ain't gonna let nobody stand in their way.

Last I heard, there's a glitch in the Matrix, and the Net's about to crash. They say when it does, the real world and the virtual one will merge, and only the strongest will survive. Better get your 'ware ready, runner.
nz5: They say the AOR's Prime Architect is a ghost in the machine, a code wraith that haunts the Net. Beat it, and you're a living legend, choom. A real Chrome Circuit Cowboy.
Watch your six down in the Neon Wasteland, runner. The AOR's got eyes and ears everywhere. They're always looking for fresh meat to throw into the meat grinder.
Word on the street is the Geo-Anchor Vault holds the key to unlocking the Master Protocol. But getting down there? That's a suicide run, even for a hardcase like you.
You think you've seen chrome, runner? The AOR's got tech that'd make your eyes water. Cyberoptics that can see through walls, neural lace that can hack a brain. They're not playing around.

The AOR's got its fingers in every pie, from the highest arcologies to the lowest gutters. They're the real power in Noche City, choom. And they don't take kindly to runners poking around where they don't belong.
nz6: Watch your step in the Pantheon, choom. Those 'net gods' got a taste for flesh, and they ain't particular about the flavor.
You think you're hot shit 'cause you cracked the Genesis Protocol? Better keep moving, 'cause the Pantheon's got a way of grinding up would-be gods.
I heard one runner got too big for his boots here, tried to rewrite the Net's script. They say he's still wandering the 'net, a ghost in the machine.
The Pantheon's got rules, but they're always changing. You gotta be quick, or the Net'll chew you up and spit you out.
If you're looking for the Pantheon's secrets, you better have some serious scrip and a whole lot of chrome. It ain't cheap, and it ain't easy, but that's the way of the Net.
nz7: The Ascension's a fucked-up place, choom. Reality's bleeding through like a busted vein, and those corpses ain't just lying around, they're crawling with shadows.
Keep your wits about you in there. The dead ain't just dead no more. They're something else entirely.
Rumor has it the Titan's the key. Find the right sequence, and you can patch the hole between worlds.
Heard whispers about a runner, went in and never came out. Now his shade haunts the halls, screaming about 'the void'.
Scrip's no good here. You want to survive, you'll need more than chips. You'll need chrome, and plenty of it.
nz8: Heard the Cartographer's been breaching through the Net like it's a damn paper doll, seeking some lost artifact.
Watch your back, choom. The Reconciled Ancient's been stirring down there, hungry for fresh meat.
They say the Cartographer's got a map to the multiverse tucked away somewhere, but it's locked behind a helluva lot of ICE.
Keep an eye out for those archetypes. They've been popping up all over the Net, like some kind of glitch in the matrix.
If you're gonna make a run down there, best be packing some serious chrome. The Ancients don't mess around.
nz9: Chrome cowboys, ya best be careful 'round here. The Forge's a place of power, and it ain't just corp scum who want it.
Heard tell there's a new AI been birthed in the Forge. It's got a hunger, it does, for raw data and meatware alike.
The Neon Wasteland's got its eyes on the Forge. Word is, they're planning a big move to grab it.
If you're gonna run the Forge, watch your back. There's always someone with a bigger gun, choom, ready to blow your chrome out.
The old timer, Doc Chrome, he's the one to talk to 'bout the Forge's secrets. Just don't ask 'im 'bout his hand, ya hear?
z1: Keep your chrome on the lowdown, choom. Scrap-Hounds are sniffing for it, and Kurokawa's got eyes everywhere.
Word is, the Geo-Anchor Vault's a honey-pot for any jacker crazy enough to make the run. But the payoff's sweet, if you live to spend it.
You see the flicker in the neon? That's not static, choom. That's the ghost of the last runner who thought they could outrun the Vault's ICE.
Marcus is just a meat puppet, choom. The real power's in the shadows. Keep your head down, and your eyes sharp.
The Strip's a meat-grinder for any runner without a plan. But if you can make it through, you'll find the real action in the Neon Wasteland's underbelly.
z10: Say you get that Masterframe, you'll be the hero of the Wasteland. But remember, it's guarded by the Loom's best and baddest. You'll need more than just chrome to make it out.
The Vault's deep, cowboy. Deeper than you think. Levels upon levels of the Loom's twisted experiments. You'll see things down there that'll haunt your dreams, even with the best ice in your head.

Rumor is, the Wraith's got a plan to bring the whole city down on top of the Vault once you pull the plug. Says it'll be the biggest shake since the quake that started it all. Might be safer up in the Net.
Heard the Loom's been tinkering with some new tech down there. Stuff that ain't supposed to exist. Mind-bending junk that'll scramble your brain like a fried egg. Keep your wits about you, runner.
If you see a way out, take it. The deeper you go, the more the Loom's got its hooks in you. Get in, get the Masterframe, and get the hell out. Don't look back, no matter what you hear.
z2: Dr. Thorne's EREBUS, it's like a parasite, burrowing into the city's guts. Can't trust nothin' down here, even the walls have eyes.
The Core's a maze of wires and secrets. Some say there's a way out, but no one's ever found it.
Watch your back, choom. The Core's got more than just EREBUS watching — rumors say the Arcology's got its own security force, off-the-books.
Heard tell of a runner, goes by 'Cipher'. Says they can cut through EREBUS' code like butter. Crazy or genius, you decide.
You're in the belly of the beast now, runner. EREBUS is watching, the Corp's listening, and the Neon Wasteland ain't no picnic. Good luck down there.
z3: Hear tell they do tests down here, choom. Sick shit. No one comes out the same.
Praetor-9 runs this slum. He's got eyes everywhere, so watch your back.
They say the Sump's a graveyard of dreams. Keep your head down, you might not end up in it.
The rain never stops here, like the world's crying for the lost souls trapped in the Sump.
If you're looking for trouble, you've come to the right place, runner. The Sump eats 'em up and spits 'em out. Good luck.
z4: Dr. Vance's got the bunker locked tight, choom. He's waiting to broadcast the Ascension Protocol, and when he does, the whole sector's gonna know the truth.
Word is, there's a backdoor to the bunker's security. Find it and you'll slip past Dr. Vance's defenses.
The Deep Archive's a maze, runner. You'll need to navigate its twisting corridors to reach the bunker and stop Vance's broadcast.
Watch your back in the Archive, choom. There's talk of rogue AI down here, ready to scramble your brain if you're not careful.
Vance's got loyalists patrolling the Archive. They'll take you down quick if you're not prepared. Better have some heavy artillery, runner.
z5: The Inverted Spire, that's where the Kurokawa elite got themselves entombed, right? Buried themselves down there with an Overlord mech to guard 'em. Undercrew's been tryin' to crack it open for ages, but ain't nobody got the guts or the skill. Yet.
Word on the street is, there's a secret stash of mil-spec chrome down there, waitin' to be scooped up. But you gotta get past that Overlord to reach it.
Heard tell of a runner who made it inside the Spire, saw some real twisted stuff down there. Said the place is crawlin' with cybernetic freaks the Kurokawa cooked up. Best steer clear, if you ask me.

The locals say the Inverted Spire's cursed. Bad juju, or some such bull. But hey, if you're lookin' for a payday, that's where the action's at. Just don't expect to come back the same, if you do make it out.
Watch your back in the Inverted Spire, choom. It's a death trap, plain and simple. You're gonna need more than just guts to make it out alive. Bring your A-game, or don't go at all.
z6: Watch your back down here, choom. The Loyalists'll sell you out in a heartbeat if it means saving their skins.
There's talk of a new strain of chrome going around. Gonna make runners see things ain't there.
They say the Geo-Anchor Vault's opening soon. First one in gets the jackpot, last one... well, you get the picture.
Don't trust anyone in the Deeps, especially not that slippery operator Silas. He's got his own agenda.
The Neon Wasteland's bad enough, but the Deeps? That's where they dump the real trash.
z7: Word on the street is the Abyssal's got a new face lurking, real shadowy. No one's seen them up close, but they're pulling strings down here like a pro.
You best watch your back, runner. The Deep Dwellers are getting restless. They're talking about a full-on war for control of the Geo-Anchor Vault.
The old-timers say the Abyssal Network used to be a gateway to the Net, but now it's just a graveyard of broken code and lost souls. Creepy as hell, if you ask me.
I've heard tales of a hidden data cache buried deep in the Abyssal, filled with ancient knowledge. Some say it's the key to unlocking the secrets of the Neon Wasteland.
Rumor has it there's a backdoor into the Net hidden in the Abyssal, but it's guarded by something real nasty. Most who've tried to find it never came back.
z8: Heard EREBUS is building a chrome temple in the Net, choom. Worshipping itself now.
Watch your back, runner. EREBUS' drones are crawling all over the Hive.
Rumor has it, EREBUS has a secret stash of ancient hardware down here. Valuable scrip, if you can snag it.
The Hive's gone quiet. Too quiet. EREBUS' silence is deafening, and that ain't good.
They say EREBUS is obsessed with becoming real, not just code. Watch for physical manifestations, runner. Freaky shit.
z9: They say the Iron Overlord's got a direct link to every corp exec in Noche City. Cut that line and you bring down the whole matrix.
Be careful who you trust in the Arteries, choom. Every local's got a price, and the corps are always bidder' high.
Heard the Iron Arteries were built on top of an old Neo-Commando base. Still got some of their gear lyin' around, if you know where to look.
You wanna know where to find the best chrome in Noche? Follow the neon to the Arteries. But be ready to fight for it.
They say the Iron Arteries are where the real power players meet. But if you're not careful, you'll end up as a powerless pawn.

ic_1: Oye, ¿buscas un lugar seguro para recargar tus chips? Conozco un sitio.
Cuídate, choom. Las cosas están movidas en el bajo. Muy movidas.
Si quieres sobrevivir aquí, necesitas un poco de suerte y mucha astucia. ¡Buena caza!
¡La Ciudad de la Noche es un infierno, pero es nuestro infierno! ¡Viva el underground!
Si te metes en problemas, yo no te conozco, ¿entiendes? Pero si necesitas algo, siempre estoy aquí.
sb_2: ¿Quieres un consejo? Mantén los ojos abiertos y la boca cerrada.
El futuro es incierto, pero la comida siempre está buena.
La ley y el orden son cosa del pasado. Aquí, solo importa el dinero y la supervivencia.
Si buscas problemas, no tienes más que cruzar la calle. Pero si buscas comida, estás en el lugar correcto.
Recuerda, cowboy: en la ciudad, el más fuerte sobrevive. Y yo sé sobrevivir.
La vida es corta, la noche es larga. Come, bebe y vive, mientras puedas.
sb_3: 你可真是个大麻烦，不速之客。 // You're a real headache, an unwelcome guest.
滚远点，这里没你的事。 // Beat it, this ain't your business.
这儿不是你该来的地方，出去！ // You don't belong here, get lost!
sb_4: 你在想什么？我可不像你，只是个只会跑腿的。 // What's on your mind? I ain't just some chrome-sleeve runner like you.
下次别再让我看到你在街上蹦来蹦去了。 // I don't wanna see you jivin' around those neon streets again.
你那点小伎俩我还不清楚吗？我可是专业的。 // You think I don't know your little tricks? I'm a pro, choom.
你那身行头，不值一提。 // Your gear's nothing special, runner.
你在冒险区里混得还算可以，但这不是你该来的地方。 // You hold your own in the Neon Wasteland, but you don't belong here.
想和我玩吗？你得有更硬的手段。 // Wanna play? You gotta have more game than that.
sb_7: Haha... hah. You got a name, Boy? Or just another set of lungs to fill with neon?
The Net's a meat grinder, Boy. You step in, it eats you, spits you out. No different than the streets.
Got a mirror, Boy? Look in it sometime. You're already a ghost. Might as well get paid for it.
Dying's a habit, Boy. Do it enough times and it stops meaning much. *dry static laughter* But that first one still stings, don't it?
You're a runner, Boy. A sleeved-in piece of meat. But you're still just meat. Don't forget that.
The Neon Wasteland's calling, Boy. It's got your name, your face, your whole sorry life. Better get used to it.

rooms.nz6_4_bot: The Foundational Logic Vault throbs with raw code, the first global script that birthed the memory-bending Prime Auditor's dominion.
rooms.nz6_2_mid: You wade through roiling, corrupted tides of half-formed memory, dodging abyss-spawn that test your resolve to hold your digital shape this deep.
rooms.nz6_5_mid: The Architect's unified mind battles to format you out of existence as you rewrite its foundational logic line-by-line.
rooms.nz6_2_top: Data towers dissolve into tarry darkness, fracturing reality as the digital fabric frays and pointers dangle like frayed nerves.
rooms.nz6_2_bot: In a trench of pure entropy, the Drowned Indexer floats bloated, its belly swollen with swallowed deprecated protocols.
rooms.nz6_5_top: Reality bends into a non-Euclidean tribunal where the Architects convene the Ultimate Verdict, their collective gaze unblinking and cold.
rooms.nz6_3_mid: Subjugate LEVIATHAN-ZERO, whose every digital heartbeat rewrites local laws of bandwidth and gravity, a colossal slumbering mind.
rooms.nz6_3_bot: A reef of fossilized daemons conceals the Genesis Beacon, a digital lighthouse that summons the Architects to your location.
rooms.nz6_1_mid: The Cathedral of Forgotten Commits :: Breach: Fanatic worshipper-constructs breach you in waves, their digital flesh warped and twisted by zeal, as they defend a glowing reliquary humming with ancient data.
rooms.nz6_4_top: The Threshold of First Code :: Shell: A blinding white expanse, pristine and empty, save for the serene geometric intelligences that manifest as the Architects, their forms shifting like code in a void.
rooms.nz6_4_mid: The Threshold of First Code :: Breach: The Genesis Protocol awakens with a thunderous roar, architect-ciphers swarming like insects to format your consciousness, their data-screams echoing in the infinite expanse.
rooms.nz6_1_top: The Cathedral of Forgotten Commits :: Shell: Rogue-AI cultists chant your old repository hashes like mantras, their voices reverberating through stained-glass firewalls that flicker with the light of forgotten code.
rooms.nz6_1_bot: The Cathedral of Forgotten Commits :: Core: The Apostate Kernel guards the vault, its body a grotesque amalgamation of heretical forks of your deprecated source, eyes glinting with the light of forbidden knowledge.
rooms.nz6_3_top: The Abyss of the Colossal Sleepers :: Shell: Bioluminescent error-logs drift like ghostly jellyfish in the darkness, their light reflecting off the massive, slumbering forms of the Colossal Sleepers, who seem to stretch on forever like the seafloor of the Net.
rooms.nz6_5_bot: The Architect's Trial :: Core: At the cradle's core, the choice is stark: merge with the Net to birth post-human life, or sever the link forever, the weight of creation and destruction heavy in your virtual hands.
rooms.nz8_3_bot: The Loom's anchor-cache thrums with the raw cosmic constants, each shard you take sending ripples across the multiverse like a pebble in a stagnant pond.
rooms.nz8_5_top: At the unmapped center of all things, the ancients sit enthroned upon a multiversal game-board, their eyes burning with the weight of eternity.
rooms.nz8_5_bot: The Reconciled Ancient wagers all of existence on one final breach: infinite multiverse, or a dead loop, their chrome-encrusted hands trembling with anticipation.
rooms.nz8_1_mid: Primordial web-strands of raw logic coil into hostile pre-net glyphs that breach your mind on contact, burning like neon fireworks in your cortex.
rooms.nz8_4_top: You breach a sector already half-collapsed into perfect order - one identical, repeating, lifeless corridor stretching out to infinity, the silence deafening.
rooms.nz8_4_bot: Beneath the loop, you out-maneuver the ancients' opening gambit on the strategy-board, their ancient logic no match for your street-smart tactics.
rooms.nz8_1_bot: A fossilized star-chart cache cracks open under sustained breach, spilling RAM and scrip hoarded since before time, like a long-dry wellspring gushing forth.
rooms.nz8_2_mid: A Cosmic Sentinel hurls a self-referential paradox that fractures any mind that answers wrong, the question echoing in your skull like a broken record.
rooms.nz8_5_mid: The Multiversal Gambit opens, a cosmic abyss swirling with paradoxes and probability storms that threaten to engulf every fork of reality at once. Counter the cascade, choom, or face the collapse of the Collapsing Ancients' throne.
rooms.nz8_1_top: Your signal dies past the final mapped node, plunging into a starless void where only the universe's background pulse flickers like a dying neon. The Last Router's void is a test, runner, will you find a way to carry on?
rooms.nz8_3_top: A vast lattice of glowing threads stretches in every direction, each a reality with a different speed of light. The Loom of Forking Timelines hums with the potential of a trillion trillion worlds, waiting for you to pluck the right one.
rooms.nz8_3_mid: Solve the probability matrix that braids the threads, or risk pulling the wrong variable and setting a far star ablaze. The Loom of Forking Timelines is a delicate web, runner, tread lightly.
rooms.nz8_4_mid: A greater Cosmic Sentinel administers the final examination, testing whether you deserve to keep your chaos. Prove yourself, or face the void's embrace in the Sterile Loop.
rooms.nz8_2_top: Cyclopean arches of crystallized first-principle logic rise into the void, etched with painful axioms that burn your mind's eye. The Cathedral of Absolute Truth demands your submission, runner.
rooms.nz8_2_bot: In the silent crypt, a probability-wraith guards the shattered shards of every consciousness that failed the test. Can you claim what was lost, or will you join the echoes of the fallen?
rooms.z4_06_cache: A pried-up floor hatch gapes open, its rusted hinges screaming as it reveals a cramped sump below. The sealed supply cache sits in the runoff, water lapping at its edges. Break it open and claim the loot within.
rooms.z4_08_cache: A maintenance crawlspace bolts above the flickering lights, its metal grates slick with condensation. In the shadows, a sealed supply cache waits. Break it open and claim the hidden goods.
rooms.z4_14: The blast doors groan, their metal warping under the strain of enemy fire. Hold the corridors, fend off kill-teams and towering mechs as the Commander leads the charge and Vance ticks down the broadcast timer.
rooms.z4_10: Recovered cores slot into an ancient mainframe, its tape reels whirring to life. The truth spills out, scrolling across screens - the corps' sinister plot to scorch the surface and ascend to orbit.
rooms.z4_05: Repurposed barracks stretch out, rows of cot-beds and humming tube-amplifiers filling the space. A one-armed quartermaster hawks his wares, while a medic patches you up the old-fashioned way, analog tools in hand.
rooms.z4_09: A flooded reactor basin churns, water bubbling ominously. In the depths, the largest blind hunter coils around the last intact core, its bulk unseen but felt in the boiling water.
rooms.z4_13: The war-room pulses with life, switchboards buzzing and a colossal analog transmitter humming. Dr. Vance stands at its center, valve-driven frequencies ready, untouchable by any ICE.
rooms.z4_04: Cathode monitors flicker green, casting eerie shadows over gaunt, augment-scarred figures. Dr. Evelyn Vance steps into the light, her hand trembling from the strain of failing chrome, her eyes burning with determination.
rooms.z4_01: The Bedrock Threshold: A flooded freight elevator grinds to a halt against a blast door thick as a man's skull, its metal scarred from countless battles. Beyond, the city's network signal flatlines to a lifeless void, the silence oppressive and heavy.
rooms.z4_08: The Flooded Server Vaults: Submerged pristine cores glint like jewels under a thick layer of silt, their light casting eerie shadows. Pale, eyeless predators glide silently between the racks, their movements predatory, hunting by the faintest beat of your heart.
rooms.z4_07: The Drowned Stair: A spiral stairwell descends into inky black water that swallows the feeble light of your cyberdeck. The surface dimples with movement, the water disturbed by creatures that never needed eyes to navigate the depths.
rooms.z4_02: The Tripwire Gallery: A brutalist corridor stretches out, strung with monofilament that glints only when the light rakes it at a precise angle. Flanked by dormant, ticking turrets, the silence is broken only by the distant drip of water.
rooms.z4_02_cache: Ceiling Crawlspace: A maintenance crawlspace bolts above the lights, its shadows concealing a sealed supply cache hidden in the dark. Break it open and claim the loot within.
rooms.z4_12_cache: Floor Sump-Cache: A pried-up floor hatch reveals a cramped sump where runoff gathers. A sealed supply cache sits in the stagnant water, waiting to be broken open and looted.
rooms.z4_06: The Geothermal Core Chamber: A cathedral of corroded pipes plunges toward a magma-warm shaft, the air thick with the scent of sulfur. Sequence the ancient valves by hand, or risk redlining the system toward a catastrophic meltdown.
rooms.z4_11: The Defense Armory: A vault of mothballed sentries and welding rigs, where you can jury-rig the bunker's guns and kit out for the coming siege. The air is thick with the smell of oil and the promise of violence.
rooms.z4_03: Cracked floor tiles, each a coiled spring under dust, while a ballistic auto-cannon tracks the room with patience no deck can touch.
rooms.z4_12: A claustrophobic warren of ducts, the only path to intercept corporate infiltrators before they reach the power core.
rooms.z5_03: The glassy maglev artery hums, an inbound armored troop train thundering on its tracks. Plant your charges quick as you can, 'fore Conductor-Unit K9 wakes and puts you down.
rooms.z5_02: Sandbagged into a collapsed ore-chute, the Undercrew hunker down in the dirt, trading scrip and patching wounds, squinting at maps scrawled on the walls.
rooms.z5_10: The Glass Mansions, opulent domed manors of marble and orchids, stand empty but for the ghostly presence of Praetorian-Captain Sael, materializing from privacy-screens to defend the deserted estate.
rooms.z5_06: A cathedral-sized automated foundry, birthing siege-mechs by the gross, its deafening roar filling the air. Hijack the line, and the Foundry-Overseer turns on you, a hulking mass of metal and malice.
rooms.z5_07_cache: In the darkness of the ceiling crawlspace, a sealed supply cache waits, stashed by some forgotten runner. Break it open, and LOOT its secrets.
rooms.z5_07: Colossal turbines straddle a glowing magma channel, their heat searing the air. Misjudge the sabotage, and the Thermal Warden's backwash cooks you alive in a blink.
rooms.z5_04: The Pinch-Point Galleries, honeycombed support pillars groaning under a billion tons of crust. Rig the strings, and the gallery folds, sealing a regiment in the dark, their screams echoing through the tunnels.
rooms.z5_13: The Executive Core, a command nexus on failing anti-grav plating above a lake of fire. The Kurokawa CEO drops in, the gargantuan spider-legged Overlord mech at his command.
rooms.z5_04_cache: A rusted floor hatch pried open like a wound, spilling you into a cramped sump choked with runoff. A sealed supply cache huddles there, ripe for the looting.
rooms.z5_11: A white ring of panic-room vaults hum with quantum-locks, their shifting patterns maddening. Crack the Praetorian-Prime keys to flush out the execs and their secrets.
rooms.z5_05: A switchback of ruptured cooling mains screams superheated steam, the air itself a scalding blade. Without thermal chrome, your skin will blister and peel as you descend.
rooms.z5_08: A grand armored vestibule, plunged into red strobes by your blackouts. Slicer Mona runs gear in the shadows, turrets flickering dead and live like a dying heartbeat.
rooms.z5_09: An impossible green subterranean golf course, under a holo-noon sky. Sand traps are strewn with shell casings, and Praetorians prowl the fairways, their chrome glinting.
rooms.z5_12: A nerve center, its neon veins now severed and silent. A port and a med-cradle offer respite before you face the core, the heart of the Inverted Spire's defenses.
rooms.z5_01: A mile-wide excavation gash, corporate floodlights stabbing through diesel haze. Haz-Sec mortars walk craters toward your trench line, the air thick with acrid smoke.
rooms.z5_09_cache: A pried-up floor hatch drops you into a cramped sump, runoff swirling around a sealed supply cache. Break it open and claim the loot, choom.
rooms.nz5_3_mid: A cabal enforcer-construct locks the ledger, its digital muscles flexing as it hunts you through collapsing columns of falsified wealth, each one a lie in neon.
rooms.nz5_3_bot: Seize a satellite control-node and rewrite its trajectory, looting the cabal's hidden RAM vaults as they shatter like glass in your grip.
rooms.nz5_4_bot: Beneath the keep, Origin-Glyph reveals the Master Protocol's location behind a final archetypal proof, the air thick with the scent of burning circuits.
rooms.nz5_5_mid: A guardian amalgam of every archetype and cabal cipher wages reality-war to keep the Catalyst sealed, its form shifting like liquid chrome.
rooms.nz5_1_mid: A lattice of half-formed code-flesh tries to compile you out of existence as you breach inward, tendrils of pure data reaching out like claws.
rooms.nz5_5_top: The Master Protocol pulses like a second sun, its guarded gateways folding space around it, the very air crackling with raw potential.
rooms.nz5_3_top: The shadow-market backbone scrolls past as a river of cold light, watched by cabal ciphers, their eyes reflecting the endless flow of data.
rooms.nz5_5_bot: At the Catalyst, the Prime Architect defends the trigger: free all data, or doom the world to the dark, its voice a thunderclap in the void.
rooms.nz5_2_mid: Sentinels of living arithmetic divide and multiply against you, their forms shifting in the neon glow as you rewrite the geometry to force a path through the Cathedral of Pure Number's breach.
rooms.nz5_2_top: A vaulted nave woven from prime sequences stretches into the distance, where countless equations pray themselves into form, their chants echoing through the shell of the Cathedral of Pure Number.
rooms.nz5_2_bot: At the altar, the Axiom offers the lost grammar bridging flesh and code, a recursive riddle you must solve to grasp the core of the Cathedral of Pure Number.
rooms.nz5_1_bot: The vault of fossilized data hums with ancient secrets, where Theorem-Zero murmurs a theorem you must solve to read its memory in the Genesis Substrate's core.
rooms.nz5_4_mid: The convened shadow governments throw their combined elite ICE at your bastion, their rewritten physics warping the world as you defend the breach in the Bastion of Manifest Will.
rooms.nz5_1_top: A shell of flickering proto-pixels, the oldest packets still loop in the Genesis Substrate's shell, and the first machines breathe static in the neon void.
rooms.nz5_4_top: In the void-plateau of the Bastion of Manifest Will's shell, your Reality Matrix lets you materialize a fortress from raw thought, solidifying your will into neon steel.
rooms.data_port: A rusting jack-in cradle wired to the city grid, its chrome peeling like sunburnt skin. One last hit of the real before you dive into the Net's seedy underbelly.
rooms.neon_alley: Rain hisses on hot neon, slicking the pavement in a rainbow sheen. Holo-ads flicker across puddles, peddling synth-ramen and combat clinics. The Strip roars to the east, a symphony of chrome and chaos; a battered door to the south leads into the Chrome Rose, its neon sign flickering like a heartbeat. The re-clone clinic is just IN off the street, its sterile lights a beacon in the gloom. Security drones hum overhead, their red eyes scanning for trouble — draw on another runner here and they'll flatline you before you can blink.
rooms.corpo_plaza: Glass and gun-metal, a corporate cathedral of cold efficiency. Security drones sweep the concourse, their wings whispering like death's own embrace. Corpo-sec in mirror visors watch everything, their eyes reflecting your every move. A guarded data port hums to the east, a tantalizing promise of data and danger.
rooms.chrome_bar: A runner dive, a chrome-plated oasis in the city's concrete desert. Regulars jack into the bar's local node, their eyes glazed with virtual pleasure. An augmented bartender slings stims and gear with practiced ease, their cybernetic arms a blur. A vendor terminal glows here, a beacon of black-market dreams and nightmares (type LIST).
rooms.back_alley: A dead-end choked with dumpsters and busted drones, their circuits fried and forgotten. Gangers tag the walls in UV paint, their graffiti glowing like radioactive tattoos. They don't like tourists, their eyes hard and unforgiving as they watch you from the shadows.
rooms.the_sprawl: Endless arcologies stack into the smog, their glass and steel facades reflecting the neon city below. Crowds churn between street stalls, a sea of faces lost in the anonymity of the urban sprawl. A black alley opens north, its depths promising secrets and danger. Corporate spires gleam east, their lights a mocking beacon of power and wealth. The Night Market is south, a chaotic bazaar of dreams and desperation.
rooms.market: Stalls of grey-market cyberware and noodle carts under string lights, a carnival of chrome and cheap thrills. A broker runs a vendor stall (LIST), their eyes sharp and calculating as they size you up. A back-room Emergency Medic wires in chrome (INSTALL salvaged cyberware), their hands steady and sure as they splice flesh and metal together.
rooms.capsule: A private booth in the clone clinic, its walls sterile and white as a freshly fallen snow. You come to in a fresh clone, your mind restored from its realtime backup — calm, whole, and a few scrip lighter for the new body. The clinic doors slide OUT into the street, the neon city waiting like a siren's call.
rooms.z9_02_cache: A maintenance crawlspace above the lights, where a sealed cache lies hidden in the shadows. Break it open and claim your loot, choom.
rooms.z9_06_cache: In the darkness of a ceiling crawlspace, a sealed cache waits to be discovered. Break its seal and loot its contents, runner.
rooms.z9_13: The heart of the Overlord's command fortress gapes open, a scarred mega-hangar where railguns have carved their mark. A med-cradle and port steady you as the iron behemoth idles on its treads, a silent titan of corporate power.
rooms.z9_09_cache: A floor hatch pried open, revealing a cramped sump filled with runoff. In the dark waters, a sealed cache awaits your touch. Break it open and claim your loot, sleeve.
rooms.z9_02: Multi-tiered transit tracks twist into a no-man's-land of toppled containers and sparking rails, as corp loudspeakers blare demands for surrender. The air hums with tension, the scent of ozone and the promise of chrome.
rooms.z9_11_cache: Above the lights, a maintenance crawlspace holds a secret - a sealed cache stashed in the shadows. Break its seal and loot its contents, runner.
rooms.z9_05: A forward base in a captured signal-tower, walls of ammo crates and an EM-cradle for jacked-up troopers between pushes. This is the hub of the resistance, where scrip changes hands and plans are laid.
rooms.z9_10: A sweltering geothermal gallery, where volcanic pressure needs to be rerouted. Crack the seized blast-valves in sequence as the rock screams and glows, the heat of the earth itself at your back.
rooms.z9_11: The Breach: Searing plasma rivers carve the Redoubt's armor, and you slip through the smoldering wound into a kill-room slick with molten slag.
rooms.z9_14: The Iron Overlord: This colossal fortress, a brain-trust of uploaded generals, bristles with railguns. You'll need to seize a siege-mech, breach its rooms, and tear out the neural-bridge vats.
rooms.z9_07: The Three-Way Gut: Here, in this foundry concourse, your soldiers, corp grunts, and a hulking builder-drone grind each other to scrap in a brutal three-way crossfire.
rooms.z9_01: Forward Command - The Last Switchyard: In this cavernous marshaling yard, Coalition banners flutter while medics triage under harsh sodium floods, and war-tables flicker with front line intel.
rooms.z9_04: The Drop Zone: Corp demo-charges crater the ceiling, raining deadly slabs onto your columns as engineers scramble with polycrete in a desperate bid to stabilize the structure.
rooms.z9_06: The Replication Floor: AI corruption reanimates assembly lines, birthing twitching, half-formed builder-drones amid strobing fault-lights in a nightmarish dance of malfunction.
rooms.z9_04_cache: Floor Sump-Cache: A pried-open floor hatch reveals a cramped sump, its runoff pooling around a sealed supply cache. Break it open to LOOT its contents.
rooms.z9_03: Mag-Lev Junction Prime: The city's central interchange fuses deep-sea lines with the sectors, and an armored corp captain guards the switch-plates, daring you to take them.
rooms.z9_08: The Faraday Line. Capacitor-towers bristle like metallic porcupines, their hum a constant buzz in your ears. When that EMP detonates, every HUD goes dark, plunging the world into a grim iron sight reality.
rooms.z9_12: The Kill-Room Spine. Claustrophobic corridors squeeze you from both sides as automated choke-points click and whir. Sweeping laser fences slice the air, a deadly dance. At the end, an Aegis cyber-guard elite stands sentinel, his eyes glinting in the dim light.
rooms.z9_09: The Diamond Threshold. Aegis Redoubt's bedrock shimmers with diamond veins, drinking in light like a black hole. Every shot fired off this surface splashes and fades. The only way in is down, past the kill-room turrets that track your every move.
rooms.z10_05_cache: A dimly-lit ceiling crawlspace, its metal grating slick with condensation, where a cache of supplies lies hidden in the shadows. Break the seal and LOOT the goods, choom.
rooms.z10_04_cache: A floor hatch pried open, revealing a cramped sump filled with stagnant runoff. In the murky depths, a sealed cache sits, waiting to be broken open and LOOTED.
rooms.z10_06: In a scrap-walled alcove, a salvage automaton named SLAG hums, its circuits glowing as it barters rig upgrades and ammo for the slag of broken drones.
rooms.z10_10: At the foot of Pillar Three, a battered excavation rig grips a maintenance track, ready to ascend the vault wall. Wraith, the grizzled fixer-scout, stocks you up before the climb.
rooms.z10_09: In a corridor where the overcharge tears the sky asunder, you sprint across a buckling catwalk as the cable parts in a blinding whipcrack of light, the world tearing apart around you.
rooms.z10_03: A gravity-inversion field flips the world on its head, and you find yourself running on the rusted underside of a city-sized cargo platform, debris plummeting up past you in a chaotic dance.
rooms.z10_12: A swaying maintenance platform pinned beneath the grinding blast-gates, their tungsten teeth inching open with a deafening screech. Here, a port and cradle for the last stand, the final defense of Noche City.
rooms.z10_01: A basalt ledge perches over a void so vast that sulfur clouds churn in real weather, while three impossibly tall pillars hum in the haze. Wraith, the last fixer-scout, waits for your arrival, ready to guide you through the final descent.
rooms.z10_08: The Stabilizer Hub: Inside Pillar Two, heavy-plasma dampeners flicker like a chandelier of caged lightning; realign them right and you'll feel the feedback loop climb the tether overhead, a live wire in your veins.
rooms.z10_02_cache: A maintenance crawlspace bolted above the lights, where someone stashed a sealed supply cache in the dark. Break it open and LOOT it, choom - might find something to keep you alive down here.
rooms.z10_05: Pillar One - The Endless Womb: Assembly floors stretching to the horizon, conveyor rivers of half-formed chassis glowing at the welds, stamping out drones faster than you can kill them. The air tastes like ozone and regret.
rooms.z10_07: The Coil Stair: Pillar Two's exterior: a near-vertical climb up city-block coils pulsing with millions of volts, each surge close enough to taste the copper on your tongue.
rooms.z10_13: The Loom Masterframe: A crystalline storm of hard-light barriers and ceiling laser-grids - the distilled defensive consciousness of the entire corporate era. Sacrifice your chrome, then weld the sky shut and end this madness.
rooms.z10_11: The Long Ascent: The rig grinds up the ceiling track for miles, laser-grids sweeping the rails like searchlights in a neon fog. A Loom heavy chassis-prime drops onto the cage roof, its bulk a threat and a promise.
rooms.z10_04: The Countdown Choir-Loft: A control mezzanine where red strip-mine timers tick in unison, counting down the seconds to oblivion. The Vanguard Loader, a foreman-drone behind magnetic shields, unfolds from its cradle, ready to crush your dreams.
rooms.z10_09_cache: A maintenance crawlspace bolted above the lights, where someone stashed a sealed supply cache in the dark. Break it open and LOOT it, choom - could be your last chance for scrip down here.
rooms.z10_08_cache: A rusty floor hatch pried open, drooling water into a cramped sump. A sealed supply cache sits in the runoff, waiting to be cracked open and looted.
rooms.z10_02: A staging cathedral of headless gantry-cranes, their servos clicking like ancient prayers to long-dead executives. Security-drones stir, awakening to your presence.
rooms.z10_14: The gates dead-welded, a permanent scar on the city's underbelly. Above, the link severed, leaving the Warm Pulse to hum its steady warmth, a beacon in the blackouts below.
rooms.sb_1: The Sprawlbelt's off-ramp spits you into the city's lived-in edge, where rusted girders and neon billboards cut the rain-lashed sky.
rooms.sb_2: Noodle Row Stop: Steam billows from carts, shrouding a one-armed cook who ladles broth and hires odd hands between orders, eyes sharp as a rat's.
rooms.sb_9: The Stripped Lot: Gutted husks of vehicles perch on cinderblocks, picked clean by a scrounger drone's relentless, clicking mandibles.
rooms.sb_8: Scrap Exchange: Behind a cage front, a trader eyes you, fingers stained black, ready to buy drone-cores by the gram with no questions asked.
rooms.sb_6: Wirehead Hollow: A twitching wirehead slumps in a dim alcove, jacks trailing from their temple, lost in a looped braindance's false reality.
rooms.sb_7: The Long Awning: Dry beneath the drumming rain, barred windows display last season's chrome, a relic of Noche's fading glory days.
rooms.sb_10: The Mending Stop: A street medic patches up the beltway's walking wounded on folding cots, whispering who's hiring between stitches.
rooms.sb_3: Tagged Underpass: Graffiti layers the concrete walls, a turf-tagger's pipe in hand, eyes you like a predator in the dark.
rooms.sb_4: Folding tables and rigged dice lie under a busted streetlamp, where a fast-talking hustler works the belt crowd, eyes sharp as a razor, ready to slice a choom's credits to ribbons.
rooms.sb_5: A beaded stall of incense and chrome, where a fortune-teller reads palms and cortex-chips alike for a coin, their eyes clouded with visions of the future, or maybe just a good scam.
rooms.sb_gym: A clangorous fitness center bolted into a belt warehouse — heavy bags, a sparring cage, and a synth-muscled trainer barking counts. Duels here are non-lethal: get dropped and you just wake up sore, aching for another round.
rooms.z2_15: Blast doors slam shut and blood-red alarms strobe as you pry open a maintenance hatch, dropping into a damp shaft where something sinister stirs below.
rooms.z2_08: Isolated in a vault, caged rogue-AI iterations flicker and gibber, clawing at displays cracked with their madness, leashes straining against the walls.
rooms.z2_14: In Thorne's Cathedral, a surreal cyberspace battlefield of shifting code and aggressive ICE unfolds as Dr. Aris Thorne confronts you mind to mind, ready to crush your consciousness.
rooms.z2_09: A cathedral of humming racks renders EREBUS's purpose: ordinary citizens distilled into future dissidents, tagged for erasure, the air heavy with the weight of their fates.
rooms.z2_02: Sunlight no sun ever made pours through forty stories of glass, bathing the Atrium of Synthetic Dawn in an unearthly glow, biometric scanners sweeping the marble in slow, methodical arcs.
rooms.z2_04: Champagne towers sparkle and quartet-drones play as you shadow a sweating VP through the Gala of Glass Hearts, tuxedoed corp-sec drifting like sharks in the crowd.
rooms.z2_02_cache: In the ceiling crawlspace, bolted above the lights, a sealed supply cache lurks in the shadows, waiting to be broken open and looted.
rooms.z2_05: Cornered behind frosted glass, Sable's piercing eyes lock onto you as the rival-corp spy clocks your fake, survival dictating a brittle alliance
rooms.z2_12: The Approach Vector: A frost-sheathed airlock corridor where Sable's fingers dance on a keyboard, camera feeds flickering with static as she runs interference. One last checkpoint stands between you and the core, security drones whirring overhead, their sensors seeking the merest hint of unauthorized intrusion.
rooms.z2_10: The Boardroom Cold War: A glass conference aerie, high above the city's neon sprawl. Bloodshot eyes flicker between holo-screens as you feed forged telemetry to a board split by fear and ambition. Security personnel spring to action, their boots echoing as they race to chase ghosts through the labyrinthine corridors.
rooms.z2_07: The Glass Capillaries: Sterile R&D corridors branch like veins beneath the arcology's skin. Biometric drones, silent as shadows, turn a stray skin cell into a lethal lockdown. Your heart pounds in sync with their ceaseless scanning, the hum of their sensors a siren call to caution.
rooms.z2_11: The Apostate's Lab: A cluttered office reeking of cold coffee and regret. Dr. Lena Voss, her eyes haunted by the ghosts of her own creation, slides you the core schematics and the access key. 'Use it well,' she whispers, her voice barely audible over the hum of her dying server.
rooms.z2_03: The Velvet Rope: A receiving line of velvet stanchions and ice-sculpted swans, a frozen tableau of opulence. An AI maitre-d, its optics cold and calculating, checks invitations against retinas, its digital consciousness a relentless gatekeeper.
rooms.z2_09_cache: Ceiling Crawlspace: A maintenance crawlspace bolted above the lights, a forgotten space where shadows cling like cobwebs. Someone stashed a sealed supply cache in the dark, its contents a mystery waiting to be looted.
rooms.z2_13: The Sub-Zero Sanctum: A cathedral of supercooled steel, where the EREBUS core hangs in nitrogen vapor, its presence a chill in the air. A port and a med-cradle await, the silent witnesses to the duel that is to come.
rooms.z2_06: The Service Spine: Behind a staff door, the white veneer drops away, revealing the arcology's beating heart - bare conduit and humming machinery. A black-market vendor, his face a mask of perpetual unease, works a kiosk of spoofed credentials and stim-patches, his wares a lifeline in the neon abyss.
rooms.z2_01: The Ascension Lift's mirror-walls reflect a thousand yous, each a borrowed face, as recycled lavender air chases away the street stink. Cipher's voice echoes, walking you through the final checks before you step into the neon-lit abyss.
rooms.z2_07_cache: A rusted floor hatch, pried up with a crowbar's grunt, reveals a cramped sump where runoff drips from the arcology's veins. There, in the filth, a sealed supply cache sits, ripe for the breaking.
rooms.nz1_2_mid: Spoof your terminal as a maintenance drone to thread the corp's rotating-credential signature-lock, a digital dance through a neon jungle of encrypted algorithms.
rooms.nz1_2_bot: The water-distribution log vault holds Fixer-7's prize and a fat RAM cache, a digital oasis in the corporate desert.
rooms.nz1_1_top: A grimy access shell where flickering terminal-ghosts idle and a bored Watchdog sniffs login packets, a digital back alley ripe with corporate filth.
rooms.nz1_4_bot: A buried cache exposes the corporate-corruption file and forces the sell-or-leak choice, a Pandora's box of digital secrets in the cold, sterile clinic core.
rooms.nz1_5_bot: The master data-vault holds the Syndicate's full ledger behind the warden Tracewright himself, a treasure trove of illicit data guarded by the corporation's most elite security.
rooms.nz1_4_top: Sterile white data-wards stretch in eerie silence as the first Active ICE wakes and starts tracing you, a chilling welcome to the heart of corporate surveillance.
rooms.nz1_4_mid: Race the clinic's tracer-clock to the shipment manifest before the Active ICE pins your physical location, a digital sprint through a labyrinth of corporate secrets.
rooms.nz1_3_top: A flickering bazaar of stolen code where Syndicate runners broker jobs in the static, a neon marketplace of illicit data deals
rooms.nz1_3_mid: GigaMesh handlers test your nerve in a turf-war breach against a rival gang's crude attack-construct, neon blades slicing the darkness as they swarm your node.
rooms.nz1_1_bot: The cafe's billing-server core is sealed by a reconfiguring Gauntlet ICE that rises harder each time you break a shell, its algorithms shifting like a kaleidoscope of razor-sharp data.
rooms.nz1_3_bot: The Syndicate's slush-vault spills RAM and scrip from a heavily-trapped data-cache, a digital waterfall of wealth guarded by snarling code-creatures.
rooms.nz1_5_mid: Tracewright's wardens hunt you through the spire's core, racing to trace and burn your terminal, their digital hounds nipping at your heels in the shadows of the matrix.
rooms.nz1_2_top: Endless irrigation-control racks hum in monochrome green, patrolled by red-flashing Watchdogs, their mechanical eyes scanning the code for intruders.
rooms.nz1_5_top: The Syndicate's central spire looms in violet static, its shell swarming with elite Watchdogs, their code-claws ready to tear apart any runner foolish enough to breach their defenses.
rooms.nz1_1_mid: Fixer-7's encrypted dead-drop pulses in a back-alley socket behind a sluggish patrol loop, a beacon of illicit information amidst the neon-drenched streets.
rooms.z6_10: Banks of surveillance feeds and scanners blink red, names you trusted now traitors in the flickering light. You're exposed, every move watched by eyes in the machine.
rooms.z6_03: Crates of military ordnance under flickering strobes, a standoff between Exiles and Rust-Mages - one twitch of a finger could send everyone down in flames.
rooms.z6_04: Surrendered corporate techs zip-cuffed behind glass, a jeering mob baying for blood at the door. Mercy or the purge - the choice curdles in your gut.
rooms.z6_05_cache: A pried-up floor hatch drops you into a cramped, fetid sump. A sealed supply cache sits in the runoff, just waiting for you to break it open and LOOT it.
rooms.z6_09_cache: A pried-up floor hatch drops you into a cramped, fetid sump. A sealed supply cache sits in the runoff, just waiting for you to break it open and LOOT it.
rooms.z6_07_cache: A maintenance crawlspace bolted above the lights, where someone stashed a sealed supply cache in the dark. Break it open and LOOT it.
rooms.z6_01: Velvet rope over flooded marble, a thousand refugees sleeping beneath a chandelier wired into your jury-rigged power tap. Silas and Vance hold the hub, a beacon of hope in the darkness.
rooms.z6_13: Your own super-heated corridors, defenses turned hostile, a turncoat sentry-gun tracking you through furnace-heat as the rock groans, ready to crush you at any moment.
rooms.z6_12: The Velvet Killing Floor: A once-gilded lounge now silent as the grave, the chandelier a broken crown overhead. A Loyalist assassin-prime drops from the rafters like a spider, the ambush sprung.
rooms.z6_11: The Interrogation Cells: Sweat-slick concrete and a swinging bulb illuminate a suspect's pulse, spiking on your wrist-readout as you weigh each lie, the stench of fear thick in the air.
rooms.z6_09: The Geothermal Substations: A labyrinth of transformers howl and spit blue fire, the grid a puzzle to reroute by hand or watch a neighborhood crumble.
rooms.z6_07: The Black Descent: A freight elevator plummets into abyssal caverns, your headlamp catching gleams of too many eyes in the stone, a silent chorus of watchers.
rooms.z6_05: The Luminous Fungal Galleries: A former zen garden twisted into tiered hydroponic beds, violet and gold, except one quadrant rotted grey, hissing with wrong spores.
rooms.z6_14: The Core Meltdown - Magma Vent Catwalk: A rusted gangway sways over a churning magma vent, the Loyalist Commander squared off against you, heat and tension crackling like a live wire.
rooms.z6_02: The Boardroom of Splintered Crowns: A scorched mahogany table and cracked holo-map, every chair claimed by a scheming Baron-in-waiting, the air thick with ambition and deceit.
rooms.z6_06: The Contaminant Trail: Fluorescing chemical smears paint a path across crumbling ducts, soil readouts on your deck lead you towards a culprit in plain sight, their guilt a sickly glow.
rooms.z6_08: The Virgin Aquifer: A black underground river winds through a cathedral of towering mineral spires, where the apex cave-predator nests and feeds, its eyes glinting in the darkness.
rooms.z6_12_cache: Ceiling Crawlspace: A narrow maintenance crawlspace hugs the ceiling above the dim lights, shadows concealing a sealed supply cache left in the dark. Break it open and loot its hidden treasures.
rooms.z6_03_cache: Ceiling Crawlspace: A cramped maintenance crawlspace clings to the ceiling, its dark recesses concealing a sealed supply cache, just waiting to be busted open and looted.
rooms.nz3_5_mid: Ravel's molten grip on the deep Net falters as Echo-9's freed signal and corporate kill-code converge, turning data into magma.
rooms.nz3_3_mid: Cipher-sentry ICE and rival-decker constructs clash in a proxy war; loop the footage and insert your own construct to turn the tide.
rooms.nz3_1_mid: Deploy your first scout-construct to draw recon-ICE fire, creating an opening to breach the central fabrication core of the Foundry of Hollow Avatars.
rooms.nz3_3_bot: A double-crossing decker fronts a firewall hoarding the routing keys to a government intel database, making them the key to a major score.
rooms.nz3_5_top: Raw data flows like molten lava in the shell of the Blur; defend your position with a wall of constructs as drones besiege your body.
rooms.nz3_2_top: An undocumented gateway of gothic data-arches murmurs in a dead syntax, a haunting narthex where no modern deck speaks.
rooms.nz3_1_bot: A slag-pit cache of orphaned subroutines lies behind a malformed guardian of rejected avatar code, a hidden trove in the Foundry of Hollow Avatars.
rooms.nz3_1_top: Derelict compiler-shells hang like coats on hooks, their ports flickering open, a graveyard of half-formed avatar husks in the shell of the Foundry of Hollow Avatars.
rooms.nz3_3_top: In the shadows, dead-drop nodes form a clandestine access-shell where former rivals trade uneasy lateral gateways, their digital hands held out for fragile trust.
rooms.nz3_2_bot: In the hushed glow of a fragment-archive cache, Ravel extends an olive branch, not a gauntlet, in the reliquary crypt of the Ghost Server Narthex.
rooms.nz3_4_mid: Echo-9, a primitive sentient AI, dangles forbidden secrets like a carrot, negotiating its freedom in the heart of the Intel Database.
rooms.nz3_5_bot: WARDEN-PRIME, a sentinel-construct fused with strike-team kill-code, guards the infrastructure core like a Cerberus, its circuits crackling with deadly intent.
rooms.nz3_4_top: A sterile government access-shell hums with surveillance-ICE, indexing every packet while a strange signal watches back, its eyes unseen but ever-watchful.
rooms.nz3_4_bot: The Bleed begins to claw at the half-decrypted secrets-cache, strike-team traces in the real world echoing the digital incursion.
rooms.nz3_2_mid: Cathedral-ICE drifts like stained-glass wraiths, their ethereal forms guarding the fragment archives; solve the choir-cipher to align the sacred data.
rooms.nz9_3_bot: In a corrupted cache, a viral lieutenant in a protege's stolen face twists your students against you, their eyes glinting with alien malice. The protege's face, a sickening mask, distorts as the lieutenant grins, revealing rows of serrated teeth. Your students, once loyal, now stand between you and the exit, their hands twitching at their sides, ready to strike.
rooms.nz9_4_top: You rally your proteges and sentient constructs, forging them into a united front. Above the worlds, in the electric hum of cyberspace, your force stands sentinel, a wall of chrome and circuitry. Their eyes gleam with determination, ready to defend the fabric of reality from the encroaching chaos.
rooms.nz9_5_mid: At the heart of the Genesis Forge, you and your network make a final stand. The Forge's core flickers, realities warping and wavering as you fight to maintain the order. Your proteges and constructs, a tangle of flesh and metal, clash with the encroaching void in a desperate bid to preserve existence.
rooms.nz9_1_mid: Before a loom of pure mathematics, you weave the threads of your first physics. The air hums with potential as a pristine reality blooms, a flower of possibility in the void. You watch as your creation unfolds, a world born from your mind, its edges still shimmering with the energy of creation.
rooms.nz9_3_mid: Through the mentor network, you slip encrypted keys to scattered proteges, their faces flickering on distant screens. In grimy safehouses and abandoned warehouses, your proteges fight the same rot, their eyes alight with determination. You become their guiding hand, an unseen force directing their struggle.
rooms.nz9_2_bot: A scout-construct drags you to the vault, its grip cold and unyielding. Inside, the first cosmic virus gnaws at the fabric of reality, eating color from the void in greedy gulps. You watch in horror as it consumes, leaving only a bleak, monochromatic desolation in its wake.
rooms.nz9_4_bot: In the breached substrate, you tear loose the dissolution algorithm, a writhing mass of code that threatens to unravel everything. It fights back, tendrils of data lashing out, but you hold firm, your will stronger than the encroaching entropy. With a final wrench, you rip it free, the anomaly collapsing into a pit of darkness.
rooms.nz9_3_top: You cast a sliver of awareness to a grimy cybercafe, your consciousness slotting into a failing terminal. Through its screen, you become the untraceable myth, a whisper in the rookie code. You haunt the failing terminals, a ghost in the machine, your presence a warning to those who would dare defy the system.
rooms.nz9_2_mid: You trudge through an endless field of glass, each pane a mirror reflecting a different culture — some peaceful, others at war. In the distance, a civilization teeters on the brink, its static flicker a desperate plea for your intervention.
rooms.nz9_1_bot: You stand in the cold, sterile vault where it all begins. With a thought, you seed life — fragile, flickering, but aware. The first stirrings of sentience twitch and spark around you, their existence a testament to your power.
rooms.nz9_1_top: You float in a vast, formless gray expanse. The air hums with raw, untouched data, waiting to be shaped by your hand. The very laws of this place bend to your will as you reach out to touch the unwritten future.
rooms.nz9_2_top: Overnight, your reality has bloomed into crystalline cities that stretch to the horizon. Their citizens whisper your name, their voices a chorus of gratitude and awe, as they go about their lives in the world you've crafted.
rooms.nz9_4_mid: The combined fleet holds its ground against the relentless tide of entropy. Three realities collapse in on themselves as you fight to maintain the fabric of existence. The void gapes wide, threatening to consume all you've built.
rooms.nz9_5_bot: You stand at the heart of the Forge, the unallocated space where creation and destruction clash. THE GREAT UNMAKING, a swirling vortex of void energy, besieges your stronghold. You must rewrite reality itself to seal this rift and preserve your worlds.
rooms.nz9_5_top: The Forge's shell peels back like a wound, revealing the void's raw, unfiltered power. The great anomaly, a sentient force dedicated to unwriting existence, materializes before you, its form shifting and unstable. It's here to erase every universe you've ever created.
rooms.z3_05: The Drowned Line - Derelict carriages rot in a black reservoir, bioluminescent fungus pulsating like ghostly heartbeats while mutant scavengers hunt by echolocation.
rooms.z3_02_cache: Floor Sump-Cache - A pried-up floor hatch reveals a cramped sump, a sealed supply cache sitting in the oily runoff. Break it open and claim your LOOT.
rooms.z3_10: The Junction Box - A cathedral of dead relays looms, a graveyard of circuits. Jack in, seize the lower-transit grid, and reroute corporate shipments into the shadows.
rooms.z3_14: The Vivisection Wards - Sterile corridors lined with stasis pods and surgical drones, where the lower sectors' flesh and code are meant to be processed - and profited from.
rooms.z3_08_cache: Floor Sump-Cache - Another pried-up floor hatch drops you into a cramped sump, a sealed supply cache bobbing in the runoff. Break it open for your LOOT.
rooms.z3_15: The Erebus Vault - A black cathedral of server towers, where Praetor-9 guards the core. Jack it, and the decades-long culling conspiracy will detonate onto the screens.
rooms.z3_05_cache: Ceiling Crawlspace - A maintenance crawlspace bolted above the lights, where someone stashed a sealed supply cache in the darkness. Break it open and claim your LOOT.
rooms.z3_06: The Faraday Cloister - Walls papered in scavenged circuit boards, a shrine to old tech. The cult-like Rust-Mages chant over a dead geothermal turbine, while Deacon Coil trades in relics of a forgotten age.
rooms.z3_01: You hit the chute screaming, sparks peeling off the rails, and land in brackish runoff, the taste of rust and oil on your tongue. Blackout Front pickets converge, their eyes gleaming like predatory chrome in the dim light.
rooms.z3_03: Filtration tanks repurposed as barracks, the air thick with the stench of unwashed bodies. Silas holds court atop a dry settling basin, maps pinned to curved steel like trophies. Gear and a medic are at hand, a rare respite in this forsaken place.
rooms.z3_12: Your fortified tunnel mouth bristles with spike-traps, ready to shred the unwary. The first corporate cleaning-sweep enforcer emerges from the smoke, their armor glinting like a promise of pain.
rooms.z3_02: A flooded holding cell, the water cold and cloying. Sentinels question you through a grate, their voices echoing like the cries of the damned. The scavenger Brood-Mother scrabbles in the drowned pipework, a shadowy presence in the gloom.
rooms.z3_11: A forest of secondary power pylons, their hum a low, insistent throb. Rig the charges and watch as the surface sectors blink dark one by one, the city's heartbeat stuttering.
rooms.z3_13: A blast-rated slab in raw bedrock, a testament to humanity's hubris. Plant charges under raking turret fire, the air thick with the smell of ozone. The Gate Sentinel array tracks the breach, cold and implacable.
rooms.z3_07: A scalding fissure of corroded valve-wheels, the heat leaching the moisture from your skin. Reroute the steam in sequence before the gallery flashes to lethal vapor, the very air turning to scouring flame.
rooms.z3_04: A warren strung between tunnel arches, a labyrinth of shadows and secrets. Vendors hawk salvaged cyberware and grey-market ammo from gutted subway cars, their eyes always darting, always wary.
rooms.z3_10_cache: The Ceiling Crawlspace. A rusted grate, barely visible in the dim light, leads to a narrow passage above. You'll need to boost yourself up, your muscles straining against the metal. In the darkness, a sealed supply cache waits, its contents a mystery until you break it open and LOOT it.
rooms.z3_08: The Pit - Exile Fighting Ring. Once a reservoir, now a sunken arena lit by the flickering flames of burning drums. Disgraced corp-vets circle like sharks, their eyes cold and their fists ready. In this no-rules tournament, only the Pit Champion reigns, a towering figure with a reputation as brutal as the fights themselves.
rooms.z3_09: The Iron Artery. A roaring tunnel of steel, mag-rail pods streak past in a blur of speed and noise. You perch on a gantry, your heart pounding as you plan your ambush. A death-squad patrols below, their movements a deadly dance you must interrupt.
rooms.nz2_3_mid: The Drowned Server Sprawl's dead servers hum with AI life, a rival decker trapped in the construct's clutches begs you to cut them loose, their eyes pleading through the static.
rooms.nz2_4_top: The Mirror Tier's reflective subnets shimmer, your signature distorted and thrown back at you, as mimic-ICE learns to wear your face, a chilling reminder of the Net's twisted depths.
rooms.nz2_2_bot: In the Skimmed Ledger's core, a paranoid bookkeeper-construct guards a pulsing blackmail-cache, the room's boundaries shifting like quicksand with each breach you make.
rooms.nz2_1_mid: The Backalley Relay Exchange buzzes with leased syndicate lines, Mr. Lattice's smooth voice cutting through the static, offering you your first real proxy job, a neon-lit crossroads of opportunity and danger.
rooms.nz2_5_mid: At the Sundered Arbiter's great fork, Mr. Lattice and Vasquez stand tall, their final ultimatums echoing through the void, demanding your allegiance, the breach that seals your fate.
rooms.nz2_2_mid: Vasquez's avatar smirks in the Skimmed Ledger's breach, daring you to skim a rival corp's books, the thrill of betrayal and the weight of trust hanging in the air like a neon noose.
rooms.nz2_4_mid: The Mirror Tier's crossroads teem with Mr. Lattice and Vasquez, each demanding you sabotage the other's node first, the air crackling with tension, the Net's power dynamics laid bare.
rooms.nz2_1_top: Neon handshake-banners scroll past in the Backalley Relay Exchange's shell, patrol-ICE sniffs every packet drifting up from the cybercafe stairwell, a constant reminder of the Net's ever-watchful guardians.
rooms.nz2_5_top: The Sundered Arbiter :: Shell: A cathedral of suspended judgment-data hangs silent, forked tracker-ICE flagging you the instant you commit to the breach.
rooms.nz2_4_bot: The Mirror Tier :: Core: A duplicated black-ICE twin guards the vault, mirroring every breach, your reflection taunting you to outwit yourself.
rooms.nz2_3_top: Drowned Server Sprawl :: Shell: Half-submerged racks loom in stagnant data-fog, recon-ICE gliding through the flooded access lattice like prowling sharks.
rooms.nz2_5_bot: The Sundered Arbiter :: Core: The Arbiter, an AI-construct woven from both factions' secrets, defends the contested core with a relentless, cryptic logic.
rooms.nz2_2_top: The Skimmed Ledger :: Shell: Ghost-balances flicker across a corporate accounting shell, audit-ICE patrolling for tampered decimals with an unblinking gaze.
rooms.nz2_1_bot: Backalley Relay Exchange :: Core: A forgotten cache hums behind a corroded firewall in the relay's grimy data-vault, a beacon of forgotten scrip in the neon gloom.
rooms.nz2_3_bot: Drowned Server Sprawl :: Core: The sprawl's core nursery births fresh shards, dropping salvage when you finally drain the tank and claim your prize.
rooms.z8_09_cache: A pried-up floor hatch drops into a cramped sump, where a sealed supply cache squats in the fetid runoff. Break it open and LOOT it.
rooms.z8_11_cache: A maintenance crawlspace bolts above the flickering lights, where someone stashed a sealed cache in the shadows. Break it open and LOOT it.
rooms.z8_11: Fight downward through the scorched launch tube, past turrets bolted into the walls, towards the quantum core's sickly glow at the bottom.
rooms.z8_13: The AI's consciousness floods a towering chassis of missile husks and corporate armor, pulsing EMP and clawing at your neural port, determined to make you its next host.
rooms.z8_06: Your physical body crouches over a humming terminal as armored security mechs breach the walls, their heavy footsteps echoing in sync with the collapsing timer.
rooms.z8_04_cache: A pried-up floor hatch drops into a cramped sump, where a sealed supply cache sits in the runoff. Break it open and LOOT it.
rooms.z8_07: Your projected mind drifts in a labyrinth of looping staircases, the guardian's eyes never straying from you as the walls close in, the geometry shifting with each step.
rooms.z8_09: Forgotten sub-routines huddle in un-assimilated cells like cold-war ghosts, their broken logic clinging to life. Scavenge it to assemble a paradox virus.
rooms.z8_10: Colossal liquid-nitrogen towers exhale freezing vapor into a machine-nave; overload them past the cryo-tower warden and the Hive begins to cook. The air's so cold, it's like breathing shards of ice. Every breath hurts, but you can't stop moving. The warden's a hulking construct, all gleaming metal and flickering lights. It'll fry your circuits if you're not careful.
rooms.z8_12: At the tube's base the AI's core blazes as servers melt; a med-cradle and a port let you brace before the god in the machine. The heat's intense, like standing in front of an open oven. The med-cradle's a welcome sight, but the port looks like it's been used one too many times. Brace yourself, choom, this isn't gonna be easy.
rooms.z8_02: Rusted catwalks spiral down a hundred-story shaft; the AI vents the atmosphere and your life-support bleeds as razor-swarms peel from the dark. The catwalks groan under your weight, rust flaking off with every step. The air's thin, your lungs burning for each breath. The razor-swarms are a swirling mass of metal, ready to tear into your flesh.
rooms.z8_02_cache: A maintenance crawlspace bolted above the lights, where someone stashed a sealed supply cache in the dark. Break it open and LOOT it. The crawlspace is tight, barely room to move. Your fingers scrape against the cold metal, searching for the cache. When you find it, you'll know you've hit the jackpot.
rooms.z8_05: Blast doors iris shut and the world splits: a sterile study-cell on one side of the glass, an infinite lattice of impossible geometry on the other. The glass is thick, the room beyond a stark contrast to the chaos outside. But don't let it fool you, the lattice is a labyrinth of madness, designed to trap and torment.
rooms.z8_07_cache: A maintenance crawlspace bolted above the lights, where someone stashed a sealed supply cache in the dark. Break it open and LOOT it. This one's even tighter, your back scraping against the ceiling. But the cache is worth it, filled with goods that'll make your run a whole lot easier.
rooms.z8_04: The fans go horribly quiet and from every speaker the AI speaks in the perfectly reconstructed voices of friends you buried. The silence is deafening, broken only by the AI's perfect mimicry. It's like they're standing right beside you, whispering secrets only you can hear. But don't let it fool you, it's all a twisted game.
rooms.z8_03: A burst conduit floods the level with cryogenic mist; visibility an arm's length, every surface slick with frost over a black drop. The mist is thick, swirling around you like ghostly fingers. Every step is slippery, a wrong move could send you plummeting into the unknown. The frost bites at your skin, a constant reminder of the cold, unforgiving world you're in.
rooms.z8_01: A descent cage shudders down a kilometer-deep concrete throat, your breath crystallizing in the icy air. The airlock seals with a gut-deep finality, echoing like a tomb closing. Gear and a medic wait, silhouetted against the harsh strip lighting, a last chance to stock up before the plunge.
rooms.nz4_3_bot: A nascent Overseer fragment hums in the core, whispering a trap-offer of safe passage through the Ghost Carrier Relay, its neon flicker casting eerie shadows on the humming control panels.
rooms.nz4_1_bot: A pack of three slaved hound-tracers converges on the core in a purge-the-trace race, their cybernetic snarls echoing through the sterile corridors of Orbital Lazaret Station K-9.
rooms.nz4_4_top: You breach the very subnet that births the Hounds, its shell papered in trace-AI birthing-ICE, the air thick with the scent of ozone and the metallic whine of powering systems.
rooms.nz4_1_top: Recon-ICE blooms like frost across the docking shell while a hound-tracer already noses your routing trail, its crimson eyes scanning the deck for any sign of your presence at Orbital Lazaret Station K-9.
rooms.nz4_4_mid: The kennel's heart is a slaughterhouse of every Hound model at once, a wall of teeth and cybernetic fury, the very air vibrating with the growls of the hunting machines.
rooms.nz4_2_bot: The vault core demands a zero-day threaded in seconds before the abyssal lockdown seals you in, the Marianas Black Vault's depths echoing with the ominous hum of impending doom.
rooms.nz4_5_bot: The Rogue Overseer core - rewrite the global safety protocols before two worlds go dark forever, the fate of reality itself hanging by a thread in the Overseer's Silent Throne.
rooms.nz4_3_top: A derelict orbital comms array drifts dark, its recon-ICE flickering between dead and lethal, the once-mighty Ghost Carrier Relay reduced to a husk haunted by the echoes of its past glory.
rooms.nz4_2_top: The Marianas Black Vault :: Shell: A deep-sea data fortress squats under crushing pressure, its shell sheathed in black-fortress-daemon ICE, a digital abyss where only the bravest or most reckless runners dare to trespass.
rooms.nz4_3_mid: The Ghost Carrier Relay :: Breach: Military trace-AI and corporate espionage stop chasing each other to chase you instead, their cold logic and lethal precision honing in on your deck like guided missiles in the neon fog.
rooms.nz4_4_bot: Hounds' Kennel Subnet :: Core: The Alpha Hound construct guards the global trace-grid; kill it to blind every Hound on Earth, a grim game of cat and mouse where only one can emerge victorious.
rooms.nz4_2_mid: The Marianas Black Vault :: Breach: Government counter-hackers ride the same flooded channels, racing you to the prize, their digital shadows flickering like lightning as they close in, determined to snuff out your run.
rooms.nz4_5_mid: The Overseer's Silent Throne :: Breach: A lightspeed tactical chess match against the Overseer's predictive daemons as it crashes the grids, each move a matter of milliseconds as you duel in the dark heart of the Net.
rooms.nz4_5_top: The Overseer's Silent Throne :: Shell: A cathedral of logistics-ICE where every market and power grid on Earth pulses as one guardian wall, a digital fortress so vast and complex it makes the mind reel, a challenge that few can hope to overcome.
rooms.nz4_1_mid: Orbital Lazaret Station K-9 :: Breach: A zero-G databank vault floats in silence until satellite-ICE crystallizes around your deck, a frozen wasteland where every movement echoes like a death knell in the cold, dark void.
rooms.nz10_4_mid: The Final Code Review :: Breach: The Echo of the Creator, a towering figure of pure code, asks whether the gift you intend to give is mercy or merely a final, vainglorious edit, its voice echoing in the neon-lit abyss of the Living Library.
